title: Plexalloy
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Plexalloy''' was a transparent material of greater strength than standard [[Transparisteel/Legends|transparisteel]]. It was used for cockpit [[Window/Legends|windows]] and [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Viewport/Legends|viewports]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
